scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir dist && cp index.html site.css nav.js dist/ && cp -R about services products blog skill tools dist/ && find dist -name 'README.md' -delete && find dist -name 'server.local.js' -delete
scripts.dev: npm run build && wrangler pages dev dist
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name kong-space
